number_cards.name: 0 (0's Pass)
number_cards.effect: All players must pass their entire hand of cards to the next player in the current direction of play.

number_cards.name: 7 (7's Swap)
number_cards.effect: The player gets to swap their entire hand with any player of their choice.

colored_action_cards.name: Skip
colored_action_cards.effect: The next player loses their turn.

colored_action_cards.name: Draw 2
colored_action_cards.effect: The next player must draw 2 cards and lose their turn.

colored_action_cards.name: Draw 4
colored_action_cards.effect: The next player must draw 4 cards and lose their turn.

colored_action_cards.name: Discard All
colored_action_cards.effect: Discard all cards in your hand that match the color of this card.

colored_action_cards.name: Skip Everyone
colored_action_cards.effect: Skips all other players; the person who played the card takes another turn.

wild_action_cards.name: Wild Reverse Draw 4
wild_action_cards.effect: Reverses the direction of play, and the next player in the new direction draws 4 cards and loses their turn. You choose the new color.

wild_action_cards.name: Wild Draw 6
wild_action_cards.effect: The next player must draw 6 cards and lose their turn. You choose the new color.

wild_action_cards.name: Wild Draw 10
wild_action_cards.effect: The next player must draw 10 cards and lose their turn. You choose the new color.

wild_action_cards.name: Wild Color Roulette
wild_action_cards.effect: The next player chooses a color and draws cards until they reveal a card of that color. They keep all drawn cards and lose their turn. You choose the new color.

special_rules.name: Stacking
special_rules.description: Players can pass a Draw penalty (+2, +4, +6, or +10) to the next player by playing a Draw card of equal or higher value. The penalties compound.

special_rules.name: The Mercy Rule
special_rules.description: If a player acquires 25 or more cards in their hand at any point, they are immediately eliminated from the game.
